entities.description: A statistical method used to estimate principal components and analyze variance among traits

entities.description: A graphical representation used to visualize correlations between traits based on principal components

entities.name: TOTAL GREEN FODDER YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: The primary yield trait used as a reference for correlation with other agronomic traits

entities.name: NUMBER OF TILLERS PER PLANT AT THIRD CUT
entities.description: An agronomic trait showing high positive correlation with total green fodder yield

entities.name: CUMULATIVE VARIANCE
entities.description: The total percentage of variance explained by the identified principal components

entities.name: DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of difference between parental entries attributed to cumulative variance

entities.name: HYBRID BREEDING PROGRAMMES
entities.description: Agricultural programs focused on developing hybrid varieties using selected traits
